vulnerabilities.title: Immutable is vulnerable to Prototype Pollution
vulnerabilities.description:
## Impact
_What kind of vulnerability is it? Who is impacted?_

A Prototype Pollution is possible in immutable via the mergeDeep(), mergeDeepWith(), merge(), Map.toJS(), and Map.toObject() APIs.

## Affected APIs

| API                                     | Notes                                                       |
| --------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| `mergeDeep(target, source)`              | Iterates source keys via `Obj
